tracks.name: AI Fundamentals
tracks.description: Introduces core AI concepts, basic Python for AI, and simple machine learning ideas. Suitable for students starting from zero with an interest in AI.

tracks.name: Data Analysis
tracks.description: Focuses on data cleaning, visualization, and basic statistics using tools like Excel, SQL, and Python (pandas). Ideal for students interested in working with data but not ready for heavy math.

tracks.name: Full Stack Web
tracks.description: Covers front-end and back-end web development, including HTML/CSS/JS, a backend framework, and databases. Requires some prior programming experience.

tracks.name: Flutter
tracks.description: Teaches mobile app development using Flutter and Dart, from UI basics to publishing a simple app. Suitable for beginners interested in mobile development.

tracks.name: Machine Learning
tracks.description: In-depth track covering machine learning algorithms, model training, and evaluation. Requires strong Python and math (linear algebra, statistics) background and significant weekly time commitment.
